tuning: E A D G B E
content:
This is lower than the original song, but it still sounds nice.  This version is 
the easiest to play for beginners.


[Hook]

[tab]                    [ch]Em[/ch]                  
I was thinkin about her, thinkin about me[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]C[/ch]
Thinkin about us, what we gonna be?[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]                              [ch]D[/ch]
Open my eyes, yeah; it was only just a dream[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Em[/ch]    
So I travel back, down that road[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]C[/ch]
Will she come back? No one knows[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]                             [ch]D[/ch]
I realize, yeah, it was only just a dream[/tab]


[Verse]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
I was at the top and I was like im in the basement[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Number one spot and now she found her a replacement[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                           [ch]D[/ch]
 I swear now I cant take it, knowing somebodys got my baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                                   [ch]C[/ch]
And now you aint around, baby I cant think[/tab]
[tab]                                     [ch]G[/ch]
Shoulda put it down Shoulda got that ring[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Cuz I can still feel it in the air[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
See her pretty face run my fingers through her hair[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]
My lover, my life. My shorty, my wife[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]   
She left me, Im tied[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]
Cuz I knew that it just aint right[/tab]


[Hook]
[tab]                    [ch]Em[/ch]
I was thinkin about her, thinkin about me[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]C[/ch]
Thinkin about us, what we gonna be[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]                              [ch]D[/ch]
Open my eyes, yeah; it was only just a dream[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Em[/ch]
So I travel back, down that road[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]C[/ch]
Will she come back? No one knows[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]                             [ch]D[/ch]
I realize, yeah, it was only just a dream[/tab]


[Verse]

[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]
When I be ridin man I swear I see her face at every turn[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Tryin to get my usher on, but I can't let it burn[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                                                 [ch]D[/ch]
And I just hope she know dat she the only one I yearn for[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
More and more I miss her, when will I learn?[/tab]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Didnt give her all my love, I guess now I got my payback[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Now Im in the club thinkin all about my baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                  [ch]D[/ch]
 Hey, she was so easy to love. But wait, I guess that love wasnt enough[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Im goin through it every time that Im alone[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
And now im missin, wishin she’d pick up the phone[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
But she made a decision that she wanted to move on[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Uh Cuz I was wrong[/tab]


[Hook]

[tab]                    [ch]Em[/ch]
I was thinkin about her, thinkin about me[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]C[/ch]
Thinkin about us, what we gonna be[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]                              [ch]D[/ch]
Open my eyes, yeah; it was only just a dream[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Em[/ch]
So I travel back, down that road[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]C[/ch]
Will she come back? No one knows[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]                             [ch]D[/ch]
I realize, yeah, it was only just a dream[/tab]


[Verse]

[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]
If you ever loved somebody put your hands up[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]
If you ever loved somebody put your hands up[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]                                          [ch]D[/ch]
And now theyre gone and you wish you could give them everything.[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Em[/ch]
I said, if you ever loved somebody put your hands up[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]
If you ever loved somebody put your hands up[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]                                          [ch]D[/ch]
And now theyre gone and you wish you could give them everything[/tab]
